title: OpenAI Baselines: DQN
summary: We’re open-sourcing OpenAI Baselines, our internal effort to reproduce reinforcement learning algorithms with performance on par with published results. We’ll release the algorithms over upcoming months; today’s release includes DQN and three of its variants.
summaryZh: 我们正在开源OpenAI基线，这是我们的内部工作，旨在重现强化学习算法，其性能与发布的结果相当。我们将在未来几个月内发布算法；今天的发布包括DQN及其三个变体。
highlights: We’re open-sourcing OpenAI Baselines, our internal effort to reproduce reinforcement learning algorithms with performance on par with published results.
We’ll release the algorithms over upcoming months;
highlightsZh: 我们正在开源OpenAI基线，这是我们的内部工作，旨在重现强化学习算法，其性能与发布的结果相当。我们将在未来几个月内发布算法；今天的发布包括DQN及其三个变体。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: Robots that learn
summary: We’ve created a robotics system, trained entirely in simulation and deployed on a physical robot, which can learn a new task after seeing it done once.
summaryZh: 我们创建了一个机器人系统，完全在模拟中训练，并部署在物理机器人上，该机器人可以在完成一次任务后学习新任务。
highlights: We’ve created a robotics system, trained entirely in simulation and deployed on a physical robot, which can learn a new task after seeing it done once.
highlightsZh: 我们创建了一个机器人系统，完全在模拟中训练，并部署在物理机器人上，该机器人可以在完成一次任务后学习新任务。

title: Roboschool
summary: We are releasing Roboschool: open-source software for robot simulation, integrated with OpenAI Gym.
summaryZh: 我们正在发布Roboschool ：用于机器人模拟的开源软件，与OpenAI Gym集成。
highlights: We are releasing Roboschool: open-source software for robot simulation, integrated with OpenAI Gym.
highlightsZh: 我们正在发布Roboschool ：用于机器人模拟的开源软件，与OpenAI Gym集成。
